pi_items.source: setup_task.sh copies project from /workspace/data/refactor-demo to /home/ga/eclipse-workspace/refactor-demo; export_result.sh verifies files at this path
Confirmed in actual source file benchmarks/cua_world/environments/eclipse_env/data/refactor-demo/src/main/java/com/example/demo/OldClassName.java which contains 'public class OldClassName'
Verified through verifier.py expectations: checks for 'public class NewClassName' pattern (line 75), expects NewClassName.java file; export_result.sh checks for NewClassName.class in target/classes
Confirmed in actual source files: OldClassName.java line 1 'package com.example.demo;' and Main.java line 1 'package com.example.demo;'

privileged_info_summary: The task targets a synthetic Maven Java project at /home/ga/eclipse-workspace/refactor-demo containing a class named OldClassName in the com.example.demo package. The task requires renaming this class to NewClassName using Eclipse's refactoring feature. The source code is located in src/main/java/com/example/demo/ and the project uses Java 17 as configured in pom.xml. Main.java currently references OldClassName in two instantiation statements that must be updated to use NewClassName.
